provenance.notes: Official GitHub MCP server. Provenance-only — server hosted at api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/ (HTTP) or runnable via Docker (stdio). Registered per-machine via 'claude mcp add' with a GitHub PAT in the Authorization header. PAT is a secret and lives only in machine-local ~/.claude.json. Note: the claude-plugins-official 'github' plugin auto-registers the same backend as 'plugin:github:github'; this entry tracks the direct-registration workflow, not the plugin path.
